title: Bulgaria Discovery Programme
description: Elegant 4-step application form with Rose Valley hero photography, Plovdiv inset, Bulgarian folk borders, and rose, pine, gold palette.
successMessage: Application received. We will email you within 3 business days.

options.label: Study & Research
options.description: Academic exchange, research visits, and campus programmes.

options.label: Work & Career
options.description: Professional placements and career discovery in Sofia or Plovdiv.

options.label: Cultural Heritage
options.description: Traditional crafts, music, festivals, and Thracian heritage.

options.label: Nature & Eco
options.description: Balkan trails, reserves, village stays, and agri-tourism.

options.label: Wellness Retreat
options.description: Mineral baths, rose oil rituals, and restorative countryside stays.

options.label: Travel & Digital Nomad
options.description: Independent route planning, coworking, and local guidance.

options.label: Sofia
options.description: Culture, nightlife, universities, and mountain day trips.

options.label: Plovdiv
options.description: Roman theatre, creative district, and cobbled heritage streets.

options.label: Kazanlak / Rose Valley
options.description: Attar workshops, folk traditions, and valley villages.

options.label: Varna / Black Sea
options.description: Beaches, museums, and relaxed seaside routes.

options.label: Bansko / Pirin
options.description: Hiking, ski culture, and UNESCO nature routes.

options.label: Troyan / Balkan Range
options.description: Forest trails, ceramics, local food, and quiet rural stays.

options.label: Wheelchair access, mobility aids, or other support needs

fields.label: Short personal statement
fields.placeholder: Tell us why you want to visit Bulgaria and what you hope to experience...

fields.label: How did you hear about us?

options.label: Subscribe to the Bulgaria Discovery newsletter - seasonal guides, events, and insider tips.
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. My information will be used only for programme coordination.
